The '''Krantian Civil War''' was a conflict between indigenous [[Krantian/Legends|Krantians]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Yittreas]] that began in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and ended [[6 ABY/Legends|six years later]].

Long suppressed by the Empire for the mineral value of [[Krant]] and its two moons, the Krantians waged a successful campaign against Yittreas with the assistance of [[Echuu Shen-Jon]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] forces.
This victory provided a boost in momentum to the jumpstart received by the Rebel Alliance cause after their [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|victory at Yavin]].

[[File:Echuu_Rebel.jpg|thumb|left|180px|[[Echuu Shen-Jon]] met [[Rebel trooper/Legends|rebel troopers]].]]

Seven years later, Luke and Leia returned to [[Hanoon]] to [[Battle of Hanoon|reassemble]] the [[Vor'Na'Tu]] and three years later, they helped [[Lathe Parthenian]] [[Battle of Hanoon|reclaim]] Hanoon's [[Terraform Processor]] in [[New Geddes]] and kill Yittreas. Hanoon now belonged to its people.

The [[Krant system/Legends|Krant system]] later joined the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Battles==
*[[Skirmish in the Krant system]]
*[[Battle of Krant (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Krant]]
*[[Battle of Geddes]]
*[[Battle of Hanoon]]

==Behind the scenes==
There is a discrepancy in the dates of the campaign. Yittreas' ''Galactic Battlegrounds'' DataBank entry states the Krantian Civil War lasted 10 years, but this was superseded by ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', which lists the final battle as taking place in 6 ABY. This article follows the later source. The [[2005]] book ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', furthermore, places the start of the Civil War around [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].
